summary: A stellar 1973 show capped by Garcia’s surprise vocal into “We Bid You Goodnight,” captured in an enjoyable recording.
review: Both reviewers rave about the magical moment at the end when Jerry slips into a spontaneous vocal of “We Bid You Goodnight,” calling it one of the best highlights of ’73. No specific technical issues are mentioned, suggesting the audio is listenable and adds to the overall joy of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 5‑star ratings and praised the show’s standout ending; recording quality isn’t described, but lack of complaints implies it is at least adequate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; reviewers did not note any flaws, implying a satisfactory listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert builds to an unexpected and memorable finale with Garcia’s surprise vocal, leaving listeners feeling it was one of the best moments of 1973.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Surprise vocal start into “We Bid You Goodnight” praised as a highlight.
